Terraform will perform the following actions:

  # aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm.orderapi_cpu will be created
  + resource "aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm" "orderapi_cpu" {
      + alarm_name          = "orderapi-prod-cpu-high"
      + comparison_operator = "GreaterThanThreshold"
      + evaluation_periods  = 3
      + metric_name         = "CPUUtilization"
      + namespace           = "AWS/ECS"
      + period              = 300
      + statistic           = "Average"
      + threshold           = 80
      + alarm_description   = "CPU utilization above 80% for orderapi prod"
      + dimensions          = {
          + "ClusterName" = "orderapi-cluster-prod"
          + "ServiceName" = "orderapi-svc-prod"
        }
      + alarm_actions       = [
          + "arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:orderapi-alerts",
        ]
      + ok_actions          = [
          + "arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:orderapi-alerts",
        ]
    }

Plan: 1 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.
